name: async-platform/symfony-bridge
description: Core Symfony HttpKernel adapter for the Async PHP Platform — converts OpenSwoole requests/responses to HttpFoundation, manages long-running lifecycle (reset, anti-leak, streaming), and provides observability bridge.

suggest.doctrine/orm: Required for DoctrineResetHook (optional anti-leak hook for EntityManager reset)
suggest.monolog/monolog: Required for RequestIdProcessor (propagates request_id into Monolog log records)
